title: [gap-hunt-probe-improvement] expand probe scope to detect runtime-sourced libraries and cross-repo umbrellas

did_gates.gate: Probe extended to check sibling-repo ledgers when target is cross-repo umbrella
Probe greps for source <path> patterns referencing target
did_gates.evidence: runtime_source_corpus() captures lines starting with 'source ' or '. ' AND lines containing *.d/ module-dir tokens

did_gates.gate: 3 false-positive classes fixed (tick_guard.sh, doctor.d/*, fleet.d/*, misc.d/*)
did_gates.evidence: live --dry-run --json probe verified 11-script cohort flips from flagged to alive
tests/test-gap-hunt-probe-cross-repo-and-source-corpus.sh — 8 tests including isolated fixture, env-overrides, and negative case

no_bead_reason: parent flywheel-2xdi rollup tracks the convergent-evolution class; child beads 2xdi.31/.34/.35 already closed; the 3-strike fix lands here per memory rule feedback_convergent_evolution_is_canonical_signal

L61_ecosystem_touch.no_touch_reason: probe-mechanism enhancement; canonical L56 ladder doctrine in AGENTS.md remains accurate; the change tightens the wired-but-cold gate without reshaping the doctrine surface

mission_rationale: The wired-but-cold detector is the L56 ladder's leading-edge probe for skill/script vitality. By teaching it to recognize cross-repo umbrellas and runtime-sourced libraries, this fix collapses an 11-script false-positive cohort that was eating fleet attention via gap-hunt auto-bead-filing rotation. Directly serves continuous-orchestrator-uptime by removing one of the recurring orchestrator-noise sources.
